sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 코스트코 2026 회계연도 2분기 매출 682억 4,000만 달러로 전년 대비 9.1% 증가하며 견조한 성장세 기록

keyPoints.text: 2026 회계연도 2분기 매출은 682억 4,000만 달러로 전년 동기 대비 9.1% 증가함

businessChanges.text: 디지털 전환 부문 매출이 지속적인 성장세를 보이고 있으며, 전 세계 924개 창고형 매장을 운영 중임
2월 매출은 음력 설 연휴 시점 차이로 인해 해외 부문 및 전체 매출에 약 0.5%~4.0%의 긍정적 영향을 미침

financialHighlights.text: 상반기(24주) 누적 매출은 1,342억 2,000만 달러로 전년 대비 8.7% 증가함

watchItems.text: 음력 설 연휴 시점 변화가 향후 분기별 매출 비교에 미치는 영향과 디지털 부문의 성장 지속성 확인 필요

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 costex9918-k3526.htm EX-99.1 Document Exhibit 99.1 Press Release COSTCO WHOLESALE CORPORATION REPORTS SECOND QUARTER AND YEAR-TO-DATE OPERATING RESULTS FOR FISCAL 2026 AND FEBRUARY SALES RESULTS ISSAQUAH, Wash., March 5, 2026 - Costco Wholesale Corporation (“Costco” or the “Company”) (Nasdaq: COST) today announced its operating results for the second quarter (twelve weeks) and the first 24 weeks of fiscal 2026, ended February 15, 2026. Net sales for the quarter increased 9.1 percent, to $68.24 billion, from $62.53 billion last year. Net sales for the first 24 weeks increased 8.7 percent, to $134.22 billion, from $123.52 billion last year. Comparable sales for the second quarter and first 24 weeks o  Normalized numeric aliases: $68.24 billion = 682억 4,000만 달러; $62.53 billion = 625억 3,000만 달러; $134.22 billion = 1,342억 2,000만 달러; $123.52 billion = 1,235억 2,000만 달러; $68.24 = 68.24달러; $62.53 = 62.53달러; $134.22 = 134.22달러; $123.52 = 123.52달러; 8.7 percent = 8.7%; 9.1 percent = 9.1%.

otal Company 7.4% 6.7% 6.9% 6.5% Digitally-Enabled 22.6% 21.7% 21.6% 21.2% *Excluding the impacts from changes in gasoline prices and foreign exchange. Net income for the quarter was $2,035 million, $4.58 per diluted share, compared to $1,788 million, $4.02 per diluted share, last year. Net income for the first 24 weeks was $4.04 billion, $9.08 per diluted share, compared to $3.59 billion, $8.06 per diluted share, last year. a 12.8% 9.3% 8.5% 8.2% Other International 17.9% 10.9% 10.7% 6.6% Total Company 7.9% 7.0% 6.8% 6.4% Digitally-Enabled 21.8% 20.8% 21.8% 21.3% *Excluding the impacts from changes in gasoline prices and foreign exchange. Lunar and Chinese New Years occurred on February 17, 19 days later this year. The shift positively impacted February Other International and Total Company sales by approximately 4.0% and 0.5%, respectively. Press Release Costco currently operates 924 warehouses, including 634 in the United States and Puerto Rico, 114 in Canada, 42 in Mexico, 37 in Japan, 29 in the United Kingdom, 20 in Korea, 15 in Australia, 14 in Taiwan, seven in China, five in Spain, three in France, two in Sweden, and one each in Iceland, and New Zealand.
